# Electronic Artefacts

> Electronic Artefacts designs digital products, knowledge systems, cultural platforms and research-led experiences. The public site is a static knowledge graph with canonical HTML pages, stable entity identifiers, JSON-LD, search documents and graph exports.

Use canonical HTML URLs for human-facing citations. Use identifier routes under /id/ and JSON-LD alternates for entity-level retrieval. The public graph is in English and is safe to crawl for search, retrieval and citation when robots.txt allows it.

## Primary Entry Points

- [Home](https://electronicartefacts.com/): Studio overview and main navigation.
- [Knowledge](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/): Canonical knowledge graph hub.
- [Concepts](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/): Definitions for core concepts.
- [Technologies](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/technologies/): Technical standards, platforms and protocols.
- [Publications](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/): Research notes and technical articles.
- [Projects](https://electronicartefacts.com/projects.html): Selected work and case studies.
- [Programs](https://electronicartefacts.com/programs.html): Software programs and runtime systems.
- [Search](https://electronicartefacts.com/search/?q=knowledge%20graph): Public site search endpoint with q parameter.
- [Contact](https://electronicartefacts.com/contact.html): Contact route for collaboration and inquiry.

## Machine-Readable Resources

- [Sitemap](https://electronicartefacts.com/sitemap.xml): Indexable public URLs.
- [Agent manifest](https://electronicartefacts.com/agent-manifest.json): Structured map of public records and retrieval resources.
- [Full LLM index](https://electronicartefacts.com/llms-full.txt): Complete public record list with summaries and identifier links.
- [OpenSearch](https://electronicartefacts.com/opensearch.xml): Search description for /search/?q={searchTerms}.
- [Knowledge graph catalog JSON-LD](https://electronicartefacts.com/graph/catalog.jsonld): DataCatalog/Dataset description of the public graph.
- [Search documents](https://electronicartefacts.com/search/documents.json): Public retrieval corpus used by site search.
- [Public catalog](https://electronicartefacts.com/generated/public/catalog.json): Public entities, routes and relations.
- [Graph entities](https://electronicartefacts.com/graph/entities.json): Public entity catalog export.
- [Graph relations](https://electronicartefacts.com/graph/relations.json): Public relation export.

## Canonical Records

- [Electronic Artefacts](https://electronicartefacts.com/organizations/electronic-artefacts/): Electronic Artefacts connects research, software, design, cultural production and archival practice through a shared graph of projects, programs and knowledge.
- [VASTE](https://electronicartefacts.com/programs/vaste/): VASTE connects Runtime Theory to implemented graph systems and can be evaluated through scoped repository access, technical pilots, implementation work and licensing conversations.
- [Vestiges](https://electronicartefacts.com/projects/vestiges/): A knowledge-first product where provenance, contribution, discovery and professional services grow from one historized graph.
- [AI Agents vs AI Workflows](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/ai-agents-vs-ai-workflows/): Understand the difference between AI agents and AI workflows, when to use each architecture, and how to design reliable hybrid systems.
- [Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Knowledge Systems](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/retrieval-augmented-generation-and-knowledge-systems/): Learn how retrieval-augmented generation works and how to build source-grounded RAG systems with metadata, knowledge graphs and evaluation.
- [AI Agent](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/ai-agent/): An AI agent is a software system in which a model can select actions, use tools, observe results and adapt its next steps toward an objective within defined boundaries.
- [Knowledge Graph](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/knowledge-graph/): A knowledge graph is a structured network of entities, identifiers and typed relationships that makes knowledge navigable, queryable and reusable across contexts.
- [Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/retrieval-augmented-generation/): Retrieval-augmented generation is an architecture that retrieves external information at query time and supplies selected evidence to a generative model before or during...
- [Model Context Protocol](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/technologies/model-context-protocol/): A technology record for MCP as an integration protocol for tool-using AI applications, resources and contextual workflows.
- [Electronic Artefacts](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/organizations/electronic-artefacts/): Un studio reliant stratégie, design, logiciel, recherche et production culturelle au sein de systèmes publics durables.
- [ORETH](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/programs/oreth/): Un programme de recherche audio reliant analyse fréquentielle, détection d’événements, reconnaissance de motifs, écoute machine et production artistique.
- [ORETH](https://electronicartefacts.com/programs/oreth/): A public program record for ORETH as both an audio research system and the technical-cultural layer connected to Palimpsests.
- [VASTE](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/programs/vaste/): VASTE relie la théorie des moteurs à des systèmes graphiques implémentés et peut être évalué par un accès encadré au dépôt, des pilotes techniques, des missions...
- [Palimpsests](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/projects/palimpsests/): Une œuvre musicale et éditoriale en cinq actes reliant recherche sonore, mémoire culturelle, archives et production visuelle.
- [Palimpsests](https://electronicartefacts.com/projects/palimpsests/): A canonical project record for Palimpsests as a compound audio, visual and research publication within Electronic Artefacts.
- [Vestiges](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/projects/vestiges/): Un produit centré sur la connaissance où provenance, contribution, découverte et services professionnels émergent d’un même graphe historisé.
- [Runtime Theory](https://electronicartefacts.com/research/fields/runtime-theory/): An active Electronic Artefacts research field connecting early VOID experiments, VASTE and the definition of graph runtime.
- [Théorie du runtime](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/research/fields/runtime-theory/): An active Electronic Artefacts recherche field connecting early VOID experiments, VASTE et the definition de graphe runtime.

- [Humans.txt](https://electronicartefacts.com/humans.txt)
- [Security.txt](https://electronicartefacts.com/.well-known/security.txt)
